title: Stygian End Continuation
description: just a continuation of stygian end for 1.12.2
body:
# Stygian End Continuation

This version its a continuation of Stygian End https://legacy.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/stygian-end-biome-expansion

Made for MMD's SpookyJam 2018.

 

Stygian End adds two new biomes to the end dimension and a handful of new ender themed blocks and plants.

![Stygian Growth:.](https://i.imgur.com/NDX43ft.png "Stygian Growth:")
**Stygian Growth:**

A biome of plant life in the end. Patchy, purple grass dottted with grass and bioluminescent plants. Towering Wyrmwood grow here, but players harvesting their deep purple wood might encounter an endermite infestation. 

![Acidic Plains.](https://i.imgur.com/KMdYUvm.png "Acidic Plains:")
**Acidic Plains:**

A harsh enderic acid spews from beneath the porphyry rock. The tainted liquid has corrupted the stone and plant life around it, making traveling through this biome dangerous. 

# Changes maked in the fork

Changes listed here : https://github.com/quentin452/enderoni-continuation/wiki
